title: Forest Pine & Pomegranate Scented Candle Gift Set – 3 Red Glass Votives | 24-Hour Burn Time | Christmas Home Décor & Winter Fragrance Trio
features: Festive Forest Pine & Pomegranate Fragrance A cosy blend of crisp woodland pine and sweet pomegranate that creates a luxurious seasonal atmosphere — perfect for Christmas, winter evenings, dinner parties or year-round home ambience.

8 Hours Per Candle (24 Hours Total) Each votive provides a clean, consistent 8-hour burn, giving you up to 24 hours of fragrance and warm candlelight for gatherings, relaxation or romantic evenings at home.
Elegant Red Glass Votive Holders Rich burgundy glass adds decorative festive charm to mantels, shelves, dining tables or bathrooms, catching the candlelight beautifully to create an inviting glow.

Ready-to-Gift Botanical Packaging Illustrated pomegranate and foliage design makes this an ideal Christmas gift, stocking filler, hostess present, teacher gift or Secret Santa surprise — no wrapping needed.

Room-Filling Yet Gentle Scent Premium fragrance fills living rooms, bedrooms, bathrooms or entryways without overwhelming your space — ideal for creating comforting ambience or multiple fragrance zones.
description: Luxurious Votive Candle Set for Your Home Bask in the luxurious fragrance of forest pine and juicy pomegranate with this set of 3 votive candles. Encased in rich red glass holders and beautifully presented in illustrated packaging, each candle infuses your space with a captivating blend of crisp woodland notes and fruity warmth. Whether you're creating a festive ambience or enjoying a cosy evening, these mini-scented candles are the perfect way to uplift your surroundings with a touch of seasonal charm. Long-Lasting 8-Hour Burn Time Each votive candle provides an impressive 8-hour burn time allowing you to enjoy continuous fragrance throughout your home. The candles are carefully crafted to ensure consistent scent throw and even burning. The rich red glass votive holders not only protect the flame but also add stunning visual appeal to any room creating both ambient lighting and decorative home fragrance elegance. Premium Quality & Thoughtful Presentation This candle set arrives in beautifully illustrated premium packaging making it an ideal gift for loved ones during festive occasions or special celebrations. The presentation reflects the quality of the product inside ensuring a delightful unboxing experience that speaks to the care taken in every aspect of these scented candles. Versatile Scent for Every Room The sophisticated forest pine and pomegranate fragrance works beautifully in any room. Use these decorative scented candles in your living room bedroom bathroom or kitchen. They're perfect for creating romantic dinner ambience adding seasonal charm during winter months or simply uplifting your daily surroundings with a touch of luxury and natural fragrance. Care & Safety Instructions For your safety please retain this information for future reference. Never leave a burning candle unattended. Keep away from things that can catch fire. Keep away from children and pets. Use a heat resistant candleholder. Keep candles at least 10cm apart from each other. Do not burn in a draught or place near a heat source. Always place candle upright and trim wick to 0.5cm before lighting. Snuff out the flame rather than blowing it out to prevent wax splatter and ensure safer operation. Why Choose These Votive Candles These scented candles offer the perfect combination of luxury fragrance elegant presentation and practical home ambience. Ideal for gift-giving or personal indulgence these votive candles in red glass holders deliver professional-quality home fragrance that transforms any space into a warm welcoming sanctuary.
